01 / Mission Profile

Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, data, and human cognition.

I am an AI and Machine Learning engineer, data analyst, and research enthusiast interested in building intelligent systems that connect advanced computation with meaningful real-world applications.

My work spans machine learning, computer vision, natural language processing, generative AI, data analytics, and brain-computer interfaces.

My long-term interests include artificial intelligence research, world models, intelligent agents, computational neuroscience, and space technology.

Brain-Computer Interface

Brain-Computer Interface: Tetris Outcome Prediction

Developed a real-time brain-computer interface system that processes EEG signals collected using an OpenBCI UltraCortex headset during Tetris gameplay. Applied signal processing, feature extraction, data analysis, and machine-learning techniques to investigate neural activity and predict gameplay outcomes.

03 / Deep-Field Research

Research Interests

Exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence, neuroscience, and intelligent systems.

exploring

World Models

Investigating how AI systems can build internal representations of environments for improved decision-making and prediction.

active

LLM-Assisted Rule Verification in World Models

Exploring whether external language models can function as high-level reasoning and verification systems within simulated environments.

exploring

Intelligent Agents

Developing autonomous agents that can perceive, reason, and act in complex environments with minimal human intervention.

exploring

AI Reasoning

Advancing symbolic and neural approaches to mathematical reasoning, logical inference, and problem-solving.

exploring

Deterministic Consistency in Simulated Environments

Ensuring reproducible and consistent behavior in physics simulations for reliable agent training.

exploring

Multimodal Intelligence

Integrating vision, language, audio, and other modalities for comprehensive AI understanding.

Publications

A Method for Doctor's Handwritten Text Recognition

ACM Digital Library · 2026

Utilizing Deep Learning and Ambiguity Handling for handwritten medical record extraction.

Neural Signatures of Eye Blinking

CARE IIST Conference · 2024

EEG analysis for inferencing complex cognitive processes during voluntary actions. Awarded Best Paper.
